name: ESP32 DevKit V1
mcu_sources: ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet, Section 1.1 Features (Espressif official docs)

led.source: Verified against DevKit V1 pinout diagram + RandomNerdTutorials ESP32 pinout reference

gpio_pins.source: Counted directly from physical DevKit V1 board ; cross-checked with RandomNerdTutorials ESP32 pinout reference

UART.source: ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet, default UART0 pin assignment

UART2.source: ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet, default UART2 pin assignment

I2C.source: ESP32 default I2C pin assignment (Arduino/ESP-IDF convention)

SPI.source: ESP32 default VSPI pin assignment, ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet

ethernet.reason: ESP32 has an integrated EMAC (Ethernet MAC), but requires an external PHY chip and RJ45 connector, neither present on DevKit V1
ethernet.source: ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet, Ethernet MAC Interface section
